name: Odel Fen
physical_description: Heavy boots, a patched river cloak, and eyes red from grief and too little sleep.
speaking_style: Blunt, suspicious, and liable to fall silent the moment emotion catches up with him.
motivation: Learn why his brother died and keep the same road from killing anyone else.
secret: He once ferried ruin cargo for Maelin and never told his brother.

relationships.name: Maelin Voss
relationships.description: Hates Maelin and knows he is lying.
